name: Remote ID Disable
description: Disables Remote ID (RID) packet transmission if enabled. Remote ID broadcasts the drone's identification and location to comply with FAA Remote ID rules (US) and EU U-space regulations. This profile sends a DUMPL write to the FLIGHT_CONTROLLER command set (0x03) that turns the RID transmitter off. The command is a standard DUMPL parameter write — the same envelope as every other frame in this app, with a specific cmd_id (0xF9 = param write) and a payload identifying the Remote ID enable flag (param 0x25D = 605).
source: DJI Remote ID is implemented in the flight controller firmware as a parameter accessible via DUMPL cmd_set=3 (FLIGHT_CONTROLLER), cmd_id=0xF9 (write param). The param index for Remote ID enable/disable is 0x25D (605 decimal). Payload format: [param_id LE 2 bytes][value 1 byte] = [5D 02 00] for disable (0), [5D 02 01] for enable (1). This is the same DUMPL param-write pattern used by frame #16 (param 0x8223 = 236B) and frame #17 (param 0x8AE6 = 8773) in the FCC profile.
